description: Test which verb produces maximum agent adoption for a read operation. Keeps descriptions identical across variants to isolate verb as the sole variable.

variants.description: Read file contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
variants.hypothesis: Bare verb -- highest-frequency form, matches CoT planning phrase

variants.description: Open file contents into a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
variants.hypothesis: Action verb -- aligns with 'open file' intent, may compete with viewport open action

variants.description: View file contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
variants.hypothesis: Perception verb -- weaker semantic match for data ops

variants.description: Read file contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
Read text contents from a staged buffer with conflict detection against external modifications. Supports offset/limit for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
